read: GRAPH-2A dense internal pathway graph produced a directional / partial signal, but did not close both row-level and cluster-level controls.
boundary: This is an internal GRAPH-2A pathway validation over Phase 4/5 graph structure and Phase 6 quantum labels. It does not validate external allostery, chemistry, grid flow, logistics, molecular pathways, or universal graph structure.
next_step: If supported, rerun with Phase 7 labels and leave-one-model-family controls. If soft or unsupported, build a still denser token/layer graph from raw V8 point-cloud exports before moving to external domain graphs.
